visual.name: progantt
visual.description: Professional Gantt Chart for project management with dependencies, baselines, milestones, and critical path analysis.

en-US.EmptyState_NoFields: Add Task ID, Task Name, Start Date, and End Date fields to populate ProGantt.
en-US.EmptyState_NoData: No tasks to display. Verify your data contains valid Task IDs, names, and dates.
